_comment: Target queue for scripts/agent_day.py. Each entry: name, target (NL + Lean signature), optional model/max_iters. These seed entries are reachable 'width' nodes (torsion-tower rungs) chosen to validate the autonomous loop cheaply. The generator will later append to this queue. Lifecycle contract (gated by scripts/check_targets.py): every entry must have a registry JSON in targets/ whose name or id matches the entry's name, and entries whose registry target is verified must be removed from this queue.
